title: Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Sequence-to-Sequence Tasks
description: A flowchart illustrating the flow of data through the Encoder-Decoder model, showing how an input sequence is processed into a context vector and then decoded into an output sequence.
relationships: Encoder processes the input sequence and compresses it into a final hidden state (Context Vector)
Context Vector is passed to the Decoder as its initial state
Decoder generates the output sequence step-by-step, using the context and its own previous output
